MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Georgiy Yehilevsky for petitioner Daniel Cunningham (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing for status on 3rd accounting.

Mr. Yehilevsky requested a continuance and explained that a completed accounting had been received on the prior Friday, and that additional time was needed to prepare prepare the accompanying accounting report. He stated that it should be ready for filing in about 1 week.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to December 16, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
